name: About Freedom: 200 Years Since the Greek Revolution
original_name: Peri eleftherias: 200 hronia apo tin Elliniki Epanastasi
overview: 200 years after the Greek Revolution, this documentary revisits the key moments that led a nation to be reborn and reclaim its Hellenic identity, from the ideological factors that ignited a revolution to the battles that forever scarred it

trailers.title: Περί Ελευθερίας: 200 Χρόνια από την Ελληνική Επαναστάση | Πρεμιέρα Πέμπτη 25/3 στις 21.00
